{{Infobox group
| name = the Perfected
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] are aware of Shyrax's activities.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] are contenders for the throne of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Perfected]] are a group whose actions can be attributed to the [[Zenith Devices]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
